ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payment_options" (
  "payment_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment option (e.g., Bank Account, Check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment option */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fees associated with the payment option */,
  "transaction_limit" TEXT /* Transaction limits for the payment option */,
  "customer_service_phone" TEXT /* Customer service phone number */,
  "customer_service_email" TEXT /* Customer service email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website for the payment option */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment option is currently active */,
  "minimum_transaction_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount for a transaction using this payment option */,
  "maximum_transaction_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount for a transaction using this payment option */,
  "security_protocol" TEXT /* Security protocol used for the payment option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., One-time, Recurring) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment type is recurring */,
  "default_duration" TEXT /* Default duration for recurring payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_times" (
  "processing_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing time */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the processing time (e.g., Immediate, Next Banking Day) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing time */,
  "average_processing_time" TEXT /* Average time it takes to process payments of this type */,
  "max_processing_time" TEXT /* Maximum time it takes to process payments of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Online, Mail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is online */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is physical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "payment_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment option associated with the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is active */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_payment_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_option_id") REFERENCES payment_options ("payment_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account that made the payment */,
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment type */,
  "processing_time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing time */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment was last updated */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_processing_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("processing_time_id") REFERENCES processing_times ("processing_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Processed) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fees associated with the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment history entry was last updated */,
  "is_disputed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is disputed */,
  "dispute_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the dispute, if applicable */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the dispute resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)
